seoTitle: Ventnor vs Venus Bay — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ventnor and Venus Bay. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Ventnor vs Venus Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ventnor and Venus Bay.
heading: Ventnor vs Venus Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ventnor, Victoria and Venus Bay, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ventnor has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Venus Bay (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ventnor or Venus Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ventnor has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Venus Bay scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ventnor scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Venus Bay scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ventnor or Venus Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ventnor has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.37% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
